metadata.explanation: This `index.css` file initializes the global styles for the React application using TailwindCSS. It imports Tailwind's `base`, `components`, and `utilities` layers, which include preflight (Tailwind's opinionated reset styles). It then applies basic styles to the `html`, `body`, and `#root` elements to ensure the application fills the viewport and uses a consistent sans-serif font. Crucially, it sets up a default light mode background and text color (`bg-gray-50`, `text-gray-800`) and provides corresponding dark mode styles (`dark:bg-gray-900`, `dark:text-gray-100`) for a seamless dark mode experience. A `transition-colors` class is added for smooth theme changes. Basic focus outlines are standardized for accessibility, and `a` tag defaults are aligned for consistency.
